title: Suits Extended
description: Adding new Comic Book Character Suits to Minecraft
body:
![Apex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcace27408ffbf5d1a8f697fdaae479045bc8057.png)
[https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y](https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y)

This originally was going to be a Server only Mod but after a while of Development I decided to Post it here on Modrinth as well as Curseforge. This mod adds 52+ New Suits prior to the Halloween Update. I plan to add more suits to this mod down the line but if you have Suggestions for suits you would like to see Join my Discord down below and Ill see what I can do.

Do you want to enjoy my Stuff with your friends? Choose BisectHosting for your server needs! New customers can use [Foi1y](https://bisecthosting.com/Foi1y) to save 25% on their first month off any gaming server. With 24/7 support, you'll be in good hands.
![Bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/34534fdb-32b9-4958-9598-135fc7c8cd66.webp)

Join the Discord - [Foi1ys Lantern Corps Discord](https://discord.gg/yME4xzmJAc)

Credit to Fsang for Allowing me to Create this Amazing Addon for his Addon.

Required Mods are
[Fsangs Heropack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fsang18s-heropack)
as well as Fsangs Dependencies
[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)

![Suit Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5917ceeac64fec29860259a44c8287aa68330486.png)
